description: Track token usage across 25 AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Kiro, OpenCode, Antigravity, Copilot, Kimi, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, Grok, Kilo, Roo, Zed, Goose, Mimo, ZCode & more — local-first, zero-config, with a dashboard, macOS menu bar app, and desktop widgets.
让 Claude Code、Antigravity、Gemini CLI、Codex、Cursor 开箱即用的分层配置模板，总结十多年的日常开发经验，持续完善中……
Expose Gemini CLI endpoints as OpenAI API with Cloudflare Workers
Run Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini side by side — each in      its own git worktree
100% Rust implementation of code graphRAG with blazing fast AST+FastML parsing, surrealDB backend and advanced agentic code analysis tools through MCP for efficient code agent context management
Google's Security extension for the Gemini CLI that finds vulnerabilities in your code changes and pull requests.
Battle-tested Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor configs, plugins, hooks and agents with Kimi MiniMax and GLM API support.
Convert AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode) into self-contained, embeddable HTML  replays

A responsive web-based UI that provides an intuitive interface for Google's Gemini CLI, enabling AI-assisted coding from any device. Features include interactive chat, integrated   terminal, file explorer with live editing, Git integration, and session management.

CodMate is a macOS SwiftUI app for managing CLI AI sessions: browse, search, organize, resume, and review work produced by Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI.  It focuses on speed, a compact three-column UI, and “ship it” workflows like Project Review (Git Changes) and one-click Resume/New.
The definitive resource for Agent Skills - modular capabilities revolutionizing AI agent architecture

Elevate vibe coding to vibe engineering: Get consistent Github Copilot custom instructions, Cursor, Roo Code, Cline, Windsurf, Claude Code, Gemini Cli, Codex CLI, kilo code, warp custom rules via a universal, managed template. Features vibe coding memory bank & best practices for large codebases.

Your local AI session library. Browse, pin, and ⌘K-search every Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & OpenCode session — and let the built-in scanner catch leaked secrets. Local-first, nothing leaves your machine.

Open-source cross-agent memory layer for coding agents via MCP. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Oh-my-Pi, Pi, Copilot, Kiro, OpenCode, and Trae.
Jetpack Compose Agent Skill — AI-powered coding guidance with actual androidx/androidx source code receipts. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and more.
Google's Code Review extension for the Gemini CLI that reviews your code changes
DeepPaperNote is an agent skill for deep-reading a single paper and generating high-quality Obsidian-style research notes. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
